decisions: 2026-03-20: 1 PRD covering state tracking, comparison logic, deduplication, queue, and manual trigger
2026-03-20: First-time add = immediately generate a draft from latest release (always draft, never auto-publish), record tag as last-seen, show admin notice

2026-03-20: Manual trigger = always draft; if post already exists for that tag: show 3-option conflict resolution: (a) remove existing + regenerate, (b) cancel, (c) generate new draft alongside existing (for AI provider comparison/testing)
2026-03-20: No email notification for manual triggers — admin notice with link to draft is sufficient
2026-03-20: Newer comparison = semver primary; fall back to GitHub published_at date for non-semver tags
2026-03-20: Per-repo pause toggle — paused repos skipped during cron but retain full config and state
2026-03-20: Prereleases skipped by default (leverages /releases/latest behaviour from API client PRD)
